name: Zippy Red Snapper and Zucchini
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Red snapper or other lean fish fillets (fresh or frozen, thawed), cut into serving pieces
2 small Zucchini, cut into 1/4 inch slices (about 3 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange fish in a microwavable pie plate, 9x1 1/4 inches, with the thickest part on the outside edge. Cover with plastic wrap, leaving one side folded back to vent.
2. Microwave on high for 3 minutes. Drain.
3. Prepare chili sauce by mixing all ingredients in a 2-cup microwavable measure. Microwave uncovered for 1 to 2 minutes or until hot. Stir before serving.
4. Spread 1 tablespoon of the sauce over each piece of fish. Sprinkle 1 tablespoon of cheese over the fish.
5. Arrange zucchini on top of the fish. Sprinkle with garlic salt and remaining cheese. Re-cover and microwave for 3 to 4 minutes or until the fish flakes easily with a fork.
6. Top with carrot slices. Serve with remaining Tomato-Chili Sauce. Makes 5 to 6 servings.
